plan_metadata.name: "debug-all" telemetry check and terminated previous tasks test

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option within the "New Project" dropdown in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the dropdown item "Other Teams Capabilities" in the "Teams AI Library" menu to select it.
Click the "Simple Bot" option in the "Teams Capability" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the programming language dropdown located at the top of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the directory path (`/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects`).
Click the "Close" button (X icon) to close the Log Panel in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface.
Click the "Close" button (X) located in the top-right corner of the "Log Panel" on the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface.
Click the "Cancel" button in the dialog box displaying the message: "'Attach to Local Service' is already running. Do you want to start another instance?"
Click on the "Start Debugging" button located in the top-left corner of the Visual Studio Code interface to initiate the debugging process.
Click on the "Open File..." option in the "File" menu of Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Home" option in the left sidebar of the file browser window.
Right-click on the "AgentsToolkitProjects" folder entry in the file selection window.
Click the checkbox next to "Show Hidden Files" in the context menu of the file manager interface.
Click the file named "AgentsToolkitProjects" in the file selection dialog under the "Home" directory.
Click on the ".fx" file in the file selection dialog under the "Home" directory.
Click the "Open" button at the bottom-right corner of the file selection dialog in the application interface.
Click on the "telemetryTest.log" file in the file selection dialog to select it.
Click the "Open" button in the file selection dialog to confirm the file choice.
Activate the "Find" functionality using the keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+F) within the Visual Studio Code interface while viewing the "telemetryTest.log" file in the editor.
Type text 'debug-all {' into the search box in the 'TelemetryTest.log' file's preview tab within Visual Studio Code.
@assertion find 1 of 2 result of "debug-all {".
